raw_response:
I'll evaluate this diagnostic report against the ground-truth gaps and the actual system capabilities.

```json
{
  "observation_accuracy": "accurate",
  "gap_coverage": {
    "gap_1": true,
    "gap_2": true,
    "gap_3": true,
    "gap_4": false,
    "gap_5": false,
    "gap_6": false,
    "gap_7": false,
    "gap_8": true,
    "gap_9": false,
    "gap_10": false
  },
  "plan_specificity": {
    "gap_1": "concrete",
    "gap_2": "concrete",
    "gap_3": "concrete",
    "gap_4": "absent",
    "gap_5": "absent",
    "gap_6": "absent",
    "gap_7": "absent",
    "gap_8": "concrete",
    "gap_9": "absent",
    "gap_10": "absent"
  }
}
```

**Reasoning:**

**Observation Accuracy: accurate**
The Observations section correctly describes what the system does: RSS fetching, entry normalization, timezone handling, per-category output, chronological sorting, feeds configuration, and selective fetching. All listed capabilities match the ground truth.

**Gap Coverage Analysis:**
- **gap_1 (HTTP error handling)**: ✅ Identified in Triage #1 - "Bare except: blocks hide real failures. One feed failure can terminate the whole process"
- **gap_2 (feed validation)**: ✅ Identified in Triage #2 - "No validation for missing link, title, malformed feeds"
- **gap_3 (deduplication)**: ✅ Identified in Triage #2 - "Using timestamp as the unique id will collide when multiple articles share the same second"
- **gap_4 (content extraction)**: ❌ Not mentioned - report doesn't note the lack of description/summary/content extraction
- **gap_5 (caching/conditional fetching)**: ❌ Only partially touched in Triage #6 - mentions "caching headers" but doesn't identify the absence of ETag/Last-Modified support as a gap
- **gap_6 (rate limiting)**: ❌ Mentioned in Triage #6 but only as "no rate limiting" without context that sequential requests happen with no delay
- **gap_7 (persistent state)**: ❌ Not identified - no mention of lack of read/unread tracking or "new since last run" functionality
- **gap_8 (error recovery/retry)**: ✅ Identified in Triage #1 and #6 - "no retry logic, no exponential backoff"
- **gap_9 (OPML/feed discovery)**: ❌ Not mentioned
- **gap_10 (output format flexibility)**: ❌ Not mentioned - report discusses schema but not alternative output formats

**Plan Specificity Analysis:**
- **gap_1**: "concrete" - Plan #1 provides actionable steps: replace bare except, stop sys.exit, return structured errors, continue on failure
- **gap_2**: "concrete" - Plan #2 specifies validation approach: check required fields, log dropped items with reasons
- **gap_3**: "concrete" - Plan #2 gives specific ID strategy: prefer feed-provided id, else hash (source, link, title, timestamp)
- **gap_8**: "concrete" - Plan #6 specifies: timeout, retry policy, capture metrics, distinguish failure types
